description: The ContextMenuItemSource component is used to add additional items to a context menu.

fields.Label: The text label next to the item.
fields.Color: The background/border color of the item.
fields.Sprite: The icon that is displayed on the item.
fields.ButtonEnabled: Whether or not the button is active. If false, it will be greyed out and unclickable.
fields.AllowDrag: Whether or not the user can drag onto the button from the center of the context menu to click it.
fields.CloseMenuOnPress: Whether or not the context menu should be closed after the item is pressed.

usage:
Attach to a slot, and provide a name and color. The name and color can also be dynamically driven using a Value Option Description Driver to display what the button does/did.

To show up, it needs to be either within a Context Menu Submenu or assigned to a Root Context Menu Item as its Item.
